Portal. (sm) 1. Abertura ou porta de entrada principal. 2. Um meio de acesso para a próxima realidade. O cinema é um portal — entre tempos, entre histórias, entre quem fomos, somos e podemos ser. Nas telas, memórias ganham forma e força, criam novas narrativas e se expandem para além da ficção. O cinema nacional projeta um Brasil pulsante e vivo. Matéria-prima para nós e para tantas outras. Com Cine Portal, convidamos você a ocupar esse espaço com orgulho. Celebramos a arte e a cultura como territórios essenciais, acreditando que histórias projetadas também projetam futuros. fotografia @brunasussekind assistente de fotografia @guidodowsley_ @eloypk modelos @adamsgabi @_grazimuniz direção de arte @raphael_tepedino filmmaker @brunasozzi edição de vídeo @brunasozzi stylist @jujubonjour assistente stylist @padillamanu beleza @tailimabeauty, @julianarodriguesmua & @mariananunesk  produção executiva @duarteanna_ @geraldoprjr @adriano_valente @oppose._ estilo @mahfranklin, @thidú, @julianatoller, @carolpin & @coucou.carolina ateliê @mariaterezadasnevesmarques, Aline Negrin, Linda Roffe & Raquel Saraiva marketing e branding Haight @beatrxzgm, @fonsecaxjulia, @larawalverde, @larissenes, @dearagaoleticia, @lochifarelli & @ninaamarante agradecimentos especiais @alexia.kronig @bernardopraguer @coucou.carolina @filipefilipefilipef @mariaterezadasnevesmarques Maria Dartora Roffé @lcsprszz @pedrocunhapedro @scorpionsznisforever @vacomtudo @vivisnarciso equipamentos @oliverequipamentos

entity_data.img_caption:
The image is a promotional advertisement for a sale event. The background of the image features a dark, textured fabric with a subtle pattern that appears to be a close-up view of a garment, possibly a shirt or a sweater. The texture suggests a high-quality material, likely cotton or a similar fabric.

Prominently displayed across the center of the image is the word "SALE" in large, bold, white capital letters. This text stands out against the dark background, making it easily noticeable and drawing attention to the offer being advertised.

Below the "SALE" text, there is additional information about the discount offers:
- "ATÉ 50% OFF EM PEÇAS SELECIONADAS" translates to "UP TO 50% OFF SELECTED PIECES."
- "+ 10% OFF CUPOM 10EXTRA" indicates an extra 10% off when using a specific coupon code, "10EXTRA."

The font used for these promotional details is smaller but still legible, ensuring that the key information is conveyed clearly without overwhelming the viewer.

In the bottom right corner of the image, there is a small rectangular logo or brand tag. The logo consists of a black rectangle with white text inside it. The text within the logo is not fully legible due to the resolution and size, but it appears to be part of the brand's identity.

Overall, the image is designed to attract potential customers by highlighting significant discounts on selected items and offering an additional incentive through a special coupon code. The use of a dark background with a textured fabric adds a sense of sophistication and quality to the advertisement, aligning with the premium nature of the clothing being promoted.

The building itself has multiple levels. The ground floor features large arched windows and a balcony with a metal railing. Above the ground floor, there are two more stories visible.
